hooks.command:
if command -v uv >/dev/null && [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then uv run pytest -q > /tmp/pytest_output.txt 2>&1; rc=$?; else pytest -q > /tmp/pytest_output.txt 2>&1; rc=$?; fi; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then jq -n --rawfile out /tmp/pytest_output.txt '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:("pytest failed. Diagnose the failures, fix the code, and retry the commit.

--- pytest -q output ---
" + $out)}}'; fi

if command -v uv >/dev/null && [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then uv run ruff check . > /tmp/ruff_output.txt 2>&1; rc=$?; else ruff check . > /tmp/ruff_output.txt 2>&1; rc=$?; fi; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then jq -n --rawfile out /tmp/ruff_output.txt '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:("Ruff violations found. Run `ruff check --fix .` then `ruff format .`, re-stage, and retry.

--- ruff check output ---
" + $out)}}'; fi
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == *.py ]] && command -v ruff >/dev/null; then ruff format "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; ruff check "$f" 2>&1; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
